title: Smoky Tartiflette Tagliatelle
description: A French-inspired pasta dish featuring a smoky twist on the classic tartiflette recipe. This hearty tagliatelle is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the tagliatelle according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, cook the diced smoky bacon over medium heat until crispy
Add the sliced French onions to the skillet and cook until they are softened and caramelized
Add the sliced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned
Stir in the grated tartiflette cheese and chopped thyme until the cheese is melted and the mixture is well combined
Drain the cooked tagliatelle and add it to the skillet with the potato and cheese mixture
Toss the tagliatelle in the skillet until the pasta is well coated with the potato and cheese mixture
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
